script.title: Script
script.description: Groovy script to evaluate. Used for all Kafka phases (INTERACT, PUBLISH, SUBSCRIBE). For INTERACT, phase-specific scripts below take precedence if set.

codemirrorOptions.placeholder: Define your Groovy script here or drag and drop a .groovy file

onRequestScript.title: On-request script (INTERACT)
onRequestScript.description: Groovy script to evaluate during the INTERACT request phase. Overrides the generic script above when set.

codemirrorOptions.placeholder: Define your Groovy script here or drag and drop a .groovy file

onResponseScript.title: On-response script (INTERACT)
onResponseScript.description: Groovy script to evaluate during the INTERACT response phase. Overrides the generic script above when set.

codemirrorOptions.placeholder: Define your Groovy script here or drag and drop a .groovy file

overrideContent.title: Override message content
overrideContent.description: Enable to replace the Kafka message content with the value returned by your script (applies to PUBLISH and SUBSCRIBE phases).

strictExecutionTimeout.title: Strict execution timeout
strictExecutionTimeout.description: Rejects scripts that cannot be fully covered by the execution timeout protection, such as scripts declaring Groovy interfaces or annotations. Enabling this option improves security by guaranteeing that no part of the script can escape the execution timeout. Recommended if your script does not declare interfaces.
